recent_calls.summary: Andrea from American Home Shield called to schedule a home warranty service dispatch for Philip Berwick's air conditioning that is not working. The agent collected all necessary details, noted the request as flexible, and confirmed that Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing will contact Philip to arrange the appointment. The user provided feedback requesting a live agent option for scheduling.

The user, Emma Hutchinson, called to confirm the time frame for a technician appointment scheduled for the next day. The agent confirmed the appointment details with Emma, who was satisfied with the information and had no further questions. The call ended with the user expressing thanks and no additional requests.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to another live agent successfully. The call lasted 13 seconds and ended with a call transfer.
The user called Budget and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, greeted the user and initiated the transfer without further conversation.

The user called to schedule an air conditioner tune-up for the summer and successfully booked an appointment for Friday, May 22nd, from 10 AM to 12 PM at their home in Saint Louis. The agent confirmed the booking and requested feedback, which the user rated as average, expressing a preference to speak to a human. The call ended with the appointment confirmed and no further issues.

The user called to confirm their appointment scheduled for May 19th between 10 and 11 AM with technician Vernon. The agent verified the user's name and phone number, confirmed the appointment details, and the user had no further questions or updates. The call ended after confirming the appointment.
The user called to confirm an appointment and provided their full name. The agent attempted to verify the user's contact information but the call ended abruptly before completion.

The user informed the agent that someone is at home and confirmed an upcoming AC service appointment. The agent inquired about the status of the AC and the user's role related to the home, but the call ended shortly after without further details.

The user called the agent but quickly realized they had dialed the wrong number and apologized. The agent confirmed if the user needed assistance with a job number, but the user declined and ended the call.

The user called to inquire about an update on a technician scheduled to arrive within a specified time window. The agent attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live agent for further help. The call ended with a successful transfer.

The user, Sherry Wise, called to check on the timing of a service appointment. The agent confirmed the user's details but found no appointment scheduled for that day. The user requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call.

The user called to inquire about the estimated arrival time of the AC technician for a service appointment at 5533 Donbar Drive in Saint Louis. The agent confirmed the appointment details and informed the user that the technician, Devon, is scheduled to arrive between 11 AM and 12 PM. The call ended with the agent transferring the user to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, Ronald W. Barnes, called to check the status of an appointment scheduled for today with technician Brooks between 11 AM and 12 PM. The agent confirmed the appointment details and the user's contact information. The user did not request any changes or additional assistance.

The user, Tanisha Snipes, requested a plumbing service appointment for a water heater with a vapor sensor issue at 142 E Etta Ave, St. Louis, MO. The agent confirmed the details and successfully booked the appointment for 8 AM the next day. The call ended after the booking was confirmed and the agent requested feedback.

The user called back after receiving a call from the number and was greeted by the agent Sophie. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help. The call ended with a successful transfer.

The user, Gracie Thomas, called to schedule a routine air conditioning cleaning at her home in Florissant, Missouri. The agent successfully booked the appointment for Friday, May 22, 2026, at 8 AM and received positive feedback from the user about the service. The call concluded with the user expressing satisfaction and no further requests.
The user, identifying as Sabrina's daughter, reported receiving silent calls. The agent attempted to assist by transferring the call to a live agent for further help.

The user, Marilyn Igo, called to inquire about the timing of a scheduled air conditioning repair. The agent confirmed the appointment details, informing her that technician Devon is scheduled to arrive between 2 and 3 PM. The call ended after confirming the information with no further requests from the user.

James Hayes called to schedule a late seasonal tune-up for his AC unit. The agent booked an appointment for the soonest available afternoon slot, which was confirmed for May 20, 2026, at 4 PM. The user was satisfied with the quick and efficient service and provided positive feedback.
The user called to speak with Amy but was informed she was unavailable. The user wanted to make a payment, and the agent transferred the call to the billing team for assistance.
The user called to speak with someone about their quote. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent and successfully transferred the call.

The user, Ruby Williams, called to request electrical service for fluorescent lights in the basement through their home warranty with American Home Shield. The agent collected necessary details, confirmed the information, and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them soon. The user declined information about maintenance programs and gave positive feedback about the call experience.

The user called to check the status of a scheduled service appointment in Illinois. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help. The call ended with a successful transfer.
The user called to set up an appointment and was promptly transferred to a live agent for assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.

The user called to set up an appointment for heating and cooling service due to pipes freezing and no air flow. The agent collected all necessary information including the user's name, address, and preferred appointment time, and confirmed the details. The user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests, and the call ended successfully with a promise of follow-up contact.

The user called to schedule an appointment but mentioned they had already submitted a request and spoken to someone else who would call them back. The agent attempted to gather more details about the service but the user ended the call before providing further information.

David Doddigarla called to report an emergency issue with his heating and cooling units not cooling for about five days. The agent confirmed details, noted the emergency, and assured that a technician would contact him soon. David expressed interest in maintenance programs and digital thermostat upgrades, and he provided positive feedback about the call experience.

The user called to inquire about a technician appointment. The agent confirmed the user's details but found no appointment on file and offered to leave a message or transfer to a live representative. The user requested to speak with a live representative, and the call was successfully transferred.

The user called to request a service for a Freon refill on their air conditioning through American Home Shield. The agent collected and confirmed the user's details, including the dispatch number, service address, and contact information. The user expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs, and the call concluded with the agent confirming that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing will contact the user soon.
The user requested to speak with a customer representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak to scheduling, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate department. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called regarding an HVAC tune-up recommended by American Home Shield and wanted to speak to a live customer representative. The AI assistant confirmed the service type and transferred the call to a live agent as requested.

The user called to inquire about a technician who was supposed to return to seal wiring at their home but had not yet come back. The agent apologized for the delay and transferred the call to someone who could provide live updates. The call ended with a successful transfer to another representative.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, greeted the user and initiated the transfer without any issues.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and completed the transfer successfully.

Ayanna called to make an emergency appointment for home warranty heating and cooling service because her AC was not working. The agent confirmed details including the dispatch number and service address, and assured Ayanna that the team would reach out soon. Ayanna declined information about maintenance programs and gave positive feedback about the quick and easy experience.

The user called to check the status of a home warranty scheduling job for an air conditioner under the name Isabella Looney or Jason. The agent could not find an appointment in the system and offered to transfer the user to a live representative, which the user accepted. The call was then successfully transferred to a live agent.

Ryan called to schedule a technician visit for an issue with his upstairs cooling system that turns on but won't stay on. The agent booked an appointment for Wednesday, May 20, 2026, at 12 PM and confirmed the details with Ryan. The call ended with Ryan declining to provide feedback.
The agent initiated the call and asked the user for their service address ZIP code, but the user hung up immediately after the greeting without responding.
The user called and provided their ZIP code, then requested to speak to a representative. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, Sharilyn, contacted Budget to schedule an urgent repair for her cooling system, which was not working. The agent confirmed details including the service address and ownership, and then transferred the call to a live agent for immediate assistance. The user declined information about maintenance programs, requesting to speak to someone immediately.
The user called and requested to speak to someone. The agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent and successfully transferred the call.

The user called to schedule a cooling system service and thermostat check under their home warranty but did not have the dispatch number. The agent confirmed the details and assured the user that the team would assist with the dispatch number and service scheduling. The user was satisfied and ended the call without further requests.

The user, Dorothy Sorrell, called to clarify a confusing text about an appointment but no appointment was found in the system. The agent offered to leave a message or transfer to a live representative, and the user requested a transfer, which was completed successfully.
The user called and requested to speak to a representative. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another representative. The transfer was completed successfully within a short call duration.
The call was very brief and did not progress beyond initial greetings. The user did not clearly communicate their needs before hanging up.
The call was very brief and ended immediately after the agent's initial greeting and request for the user's ZIP code. The user hung up without responding or engaging in the conversation.
